title: Hire through the International Mobility Program - Canada.ca
content:
## Hire through the International Mobility Program
The International Mobility Program (IMP)
- helps you (the employer) fill labour needs that support Canada’s economic, social and cultural priorities
- lets you hire temporary foreign workers without a Labour Market Impact Assessment (LMIA)
From $230, unless exempted
To qualify for this fee, you must make your offer to a group of 3 or more foreign nationals (performing artists and their staff) at the same time .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
